title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 76.
content:
There was an Old Man of the Hague,
    Whose ideas were excessively vague;
    He built a balloon,
    To examine the moon,
    That deluded Old Man of the Hague.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 76." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
